title: Dutch Church, Munroe Island
tagline: Dutch Church, Munroe Island — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: The Dutch Church in Munroe Island, Kollam is one of the old churches in Kerala.
overview.description: The Dutch Church in Munroe Island, Kollam is one of the old churches in Kerala. The church was built by the Dutch in 1878. The red brick church on the scenic banks of Lake Ashtamudi is a blend of Dutch-Kerala architecture. The only Christian family in the locality is looking after the affairs of this Church.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Koduvila
topPlaces.description: Koduvila is a village near Ashtamudi Lake in East-Kallada, Kollam district, Kerala, India. It shares a boundary with Munroe Island, and is near Chittumala.

topPlaces.name: Munroe Island
topPlaces.description: Munroe Island is an inland island group located at the confluence of Ashtamudi Lake and the Kallada River, in Kollam district, Kerala, South India. It is a group of eight small islets comprising a total area of about 13.4 km2.

topPlaces.name: Kallada River
topPlaces.description: The Kallada River is the longest river in Kollam District, Kerala, India. The river originates in Madathara, in the Western Ghats, and flows west, reaching the Arabian Sea after traveling a distance of 120 km (75 mi).

topPlaces.name: Sinkarappally
topPlaces.description: Sinkarappally (koduvila)is a small scenic ward situated between Ashtamudi Lake and Kallada River, on the outskirts of Kollam District in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Padappakkara
topPlaces.description: Padappakkara is a village in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. Between 1400 AD to 1850 AD the village was used as a safe harbour during monsoons by the wooden merchant and naval ships.

topPlaces.name: Ashtamudi Lake
topPlaces.description: Ashtamudi Lake (Ashtamudi Kayal, ml: "അഷ്ടമുടിക്കായൽ" ), in the Kollam District of the Indian state of Kerala is a unique wetland ecosystem and a large palm-shaped (also described as octopus-shaped) water body. It is second only in size to the Vembanad estuary ecosystem of the state.

topPlaces.name: West Kallada
topPlaces.description: West Kallada is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thrikkaruva
topPlaces.description: Thrikkaruva is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

items.note: Koduvila is a village near Ashtamudi Lake in East-Kallada, Kollam district, Kerala, India. It shares a boundary with Munroe Island, and is near Chittumala.

Munroe Island is an inland island group located at the confluence of Ashtamudi Lake and the Kallada River, in Kollam district, Kerala, South India. It is a group of eight small islets comprising a total area of about 13.4 km2.

The Kallada River is the longest river in Kollam District, Kerala, India. The river originates in Madathara, in the Western Ghats, and flows west, reaching the Arabian Sea after traveling a distance of 120 km (75 mi).
Sinkarappally (koduvila)is a small scenic ward situated between Ashtamudi Lake and Kallada River, on the outskirts of Kollam District in Kerala.
Padappakkara is a village in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. Between 1400 AD to 1850 AD the village was used as a safe harbour during monsoons by the wooden merchant and naval ships.

Ashtamudi Lake (Ashtamudi Kayal, ml: "അഷ്ടമുടിക്കായൽ" ), in the Kollam District of the Indian state of Kerala is a unique wetland ecosystem and a large palm-shaped (also described as octopus-shaped) water body. It is second only in size to the Vembanad estuary ecosystem of the state.
West Kallada is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.
Thrikkaruva is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dutch Church, Munroe Island?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dutch Church, Munroe Island is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dutch Church, Munroe Island?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (65 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dutch Church, Munroe Island?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dutch Church, Munroe Island at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dutch Church, Munroe Island?
faq.a: Stays in Dutch Church, Munroe Island start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dutch Church, Munroe Island?
faq.a: The top attractions are Koduvila, Munroe Island, Kallada River, Sinkarappally, Padappakkara.
